asa.gui.title: Antideath-Survival-Assistant
asa.config.opengui.comment: Opens the main configuration interface for ASA.
asa.config.creeperwarn.comment: Alerts the player when a Creeper is nearby.
asa.config.creeperwarn.range.comment: The distance (radius) within which the Creeper Warning is triggered.
asa.config.material_recycler.comment: Enables the material recycling feature to move items from Shulker Boxes to inventory.
asa.config.material_recycler_list.commen: Defines the items that are eligible to be recycled (moved).
asa.config.enable_material_recycler_blac: Activates the blacklist restriction for the Material Recycler.
List of items that will not be recycled, overriding the whitelist.
asa.config.disable_loading_terrain_scree: Removes the 'Loading terrain' screen when joining or switching worlds/servers.
asa.config.disable_subtitle.comment: Hides all in-game subtitles (audio cues displayed as text).
asa.config.disable_connect_timed_out.com: Prevents the 'Connection timed out' message from appearing.
asa.config.disable_player_armor_render.c: Stops the rendering of all players' armor in-game.
asa.config.disable_place_block_nearby_po: Prevents players from placing blocks close to Nether or End portals.
List of blocks allowed to be placed near portals, even if restricted.
asa.config.material_recycler_auto.commen: Automatically puts eligible materials into Shulker Boxes (requires mod/server support).
asa.config.display_remain_item.comment: Shows the count of remaining items (including those in Shulker Boxes) in the inventory/GUI.
asa.config.switch_server.comment: Enables the hotkey for quickly switching between defined servers.
asa.config.switch_server_command.comment: The base command used to switch between servers (e.g., '/server').
asa.config.switch_server_single_1.commen: Hotkey to quickly connect to the server defined in Slot 1.
asa.config.switch_server_single_1s.comme: The name of the first quick-switch server.
asa.config.switch_server_single_2.commen: Hotkey to quickly connect to the server defined in Slot 2.
asa.config.switch_server_single_2s.comme: The name of the second quick-switch server.
asa.config.switch_server_single_3.commen: Hotkey to quickly connect to the server defined in Slot 3.
asa.config.switch_server_single_3s.comme: The name of the third quick-switch server.
asa.config.switch_item_list.comment: A list of item IDs/names to cycle through using the Item Switch hotkey.
asa.config.switch_item.comment: Enables the hotkey for cycling to the next item in the Item Switch List.
asa.config.tap_filter.comment: Filters out unwanted entries (e.g., fake players, bots) from the TAB menu (player list).
asa.config.tap_filter_whitelist.comment: List of players or entries that will not be filtered out by the TAB Menu Filter.
